column.name: length_id
column.comment: This will be default length unite for store. Primary key of kart_lengths table

column.name: weight_id
column.comment: This will be default weight unite for store. Primary key of kart_weights table

column.name: taxprofile_id
column.comment: This will be default tax profile id for store. Primary key of kart_shipprofile table table

column.name: shipprofile_id
column.comment: This will be default ship profile id for store. Primary key of _kart_shipprofile table table

column.name: created_by
column.comment: user id of vendor who have created manual order for customer

column.name: couponDetails
column.comment: Coupon price and used price flag- MRP price or field price etc is stored

column.name: payment_note
column.comment: Payment gateway form comment detail goes here

column.name: product_attributes
column.comment: A CSV of itemattributeoption_id values, always in numerical order

column.name: product_attribute_names
column.comment: A CSV of itemattributeoption_name values

column.name: product_attributes_price
column.comment: The increase or decrease in price per item as a result of attributes. Includes + or - sign

column.name: product_final_price
column.comment: Amount after applying the coupon code + item shipping charges + item tax charges - discount

column.name: original_price
column.comment: (product_item_price + product_attributes_price) * product_quantity

column.name: originalBasePrice
column.comment: Product price without field discount

column.name: item_shipDetail
column.comment: store item shipping changes detail

column.name: params
column.comment: Coupon code and all is stored

column.name: product_attributes
column.comment: A CSV of itemattributeoption_id values, always in numerical order

column.name: product_attribute_names
column.comment: A CSV of itemattributeoption_name values

column.name: product_attributes_price
column.comment: The increase or decrease in price per item as a result of attributes. Includes + or - sign

column.name: params
column.comment: Store extra data in json format. In key value pair

column.name: store_id
column.comment: store id

column.name: discount_type
column.comment: flat, percentage, quanity_discount

column.name: condition_on_attribute
column.comment: Used for where condition (Key,value). Eg key = category

column.name: condition_attribute_value
column.comment: Used for where condition (Key,value). Eg value = T-shirt category

column.name: discount_type
column.comment: flat, percentage, quanity_discount

column.name: expiration_mode
column.comment: This is component option value for expiration mode eg Max Download, Date Expirary or both

column.name: expiry_mode
column.comment: 1 for months

column.name: address
column.comment: Which address should be used to apply taxrates. Eg billin, shipping or store address

column.name: shipping_type
column.comment: It is type of shipping method eg. weight based, quantity based etc

column.name: methodId
column.comment: This is primary key of #__kart_shipMethods table

column.name: zone_id
column.comment: This is primary key of #__kart_zones table.

column.name: rateId
column.comment: This is primary key of #__kart_zoneShipMethodRates table.

column.name: client
column.comment: Shipping Plugin Name

column.name: methodId
column.comment: Extension specific, Shipping Plugin Method id.

column.name: affiliate_id
column.comment: Unique id of affiliate user

column.name: client
column.comment: Affiliate System
